# Chinmay Arora | Portfolio, Venture Lab, and Technical Writing

> Summary: Structured overview of Chinmay Arora's portfolio, venture concepts, and technical writing spanning AI audit systems, GovTech product strategy, applied data science, LLM system design, and enterprise compliance tooling.

## Canonical Entry Points

- [Portfolio Home](https://app.chinmayarora.com/): Main landing page covering professional profile, projects, venture work, and technical writing.
- [The Lab](https://app.chinmayarora.com/ideas/): Collection page for venture concepts and startup theses.
- [Blog](https://app.chinmayarora.com/blog/): Index of technical posts on AI systems, evaluation, retrieval, and deployment.

## Venture Pipeline (The Lab)

- [Aegis AI Strategy](https://app.chinmayarora.com/ideas/aegis-ai-strategy/): AI compliance infrastructure for enterprises that need faster audit preparation, policy cross-referencing, and governance-ready operating controls.
- [Public Infrastructure Copilot](https://app.chinmayarora.com/ideas/public-infrastructure-copilot/): GovTech planning software that turns service requests, maintenance data, and neighborhood signals into ranked infrastructure investment decisions.
- [Compliance Twin](https://app.chinmayarora.com/ideas/compliance-twin/): A mid-market compliance graph product designed to map controls, evidence, and obligations into a traceable operating system.
- [Operator Memory Cloud](https://app.chinmayarora.com/ideas/operator-memory-cloud/): A shared memory layer for startup teams that preserves decisions, workflows, and execution context across fast-moving workstreams.
- [Civic Procurement Graph](https://app.chinmayarora.com/ideas/civic-procurement-graph/): Procurement intelligence software that organizes bids, contracts, vendors, and agency activity into a searchable public market map.
- [Research Commercialization Studio](https://app.chinmayarora.com/ideas/research-commercialization-studio/): A venture-support workflow for turning academic research into commercialization briefs, prototypes, and institution-ready startup narratives.

## Research Archive (The Blog)

These posts provide the technical methodology for the ventures listed above.

- [Claude Memory changes the game — but the real unlock is portable, user-owned memory](https://app.chinmayarora.com/blog/context-passport/): Notes on portable memory, canonical context, and research workflows for LLM-powered systems.
- [Engineering Virality with Bayesian Optimization](https://app.chinmayarora.com/blog/virality-bo/): Framing content growth as a Bayesian optimization problem.
- [Bayesian Optimization Meets Graphs](https://app.chinmayarora.com/blog/bo-graph/): Graph-informed experimentation and optimization ideas.
- [AI in Local Government DX: A Technical Deep Dive into Governance, Auditing, and Operationalization](https://app.chinmayarora.com/blog/the-impact-of-ai-on-local-government-digital-experience/): Public sector AI deployment, governance, and auditability patterns.
- [Segmentation for Public Sector DX: From Lived Experience Signals to Safer AI Deployment](https://app.chinmayarora.com/blog/segmentation/): Segmentation and risk-aware service design in government contexts.
- [Welcome to the Blog](https://app.chinmayarora.com/blog/welcome-to-the-blog/): Introductory note on the purpose and scope of the research archive.

## Technical Skills

Python, React, Cloudflare Zero Trust, R, SQL, dbt, Pandas, NumPy, SciPy, Scikit-learn, XGBoost, TensorFlow, PyTorch, CV/NLP, LangChain, HuggingFace, ChromaDB, RAG, Text-to-SQL, Docker, FastAPI, CI/CD, MLflow, Supabase, Prometheus, Power BI, Tableau, Qlik, KPI design, storytelling, ArcGIS, QGIS, GeoPandas, ADI/SVI, spatial statistics
